/usr/bin/cc  -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fPIC -m64 -w -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/idlc.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/options.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/generator.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/descriptor.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/types.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/descriptor_type_meta.c.o -o ../../../bin/idlc  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aeon/repos/nano-ros/examples/native/rust/talker/target-cyclonedds/debug/build/cyclonedds-sys-aa91609d1a53e3d4/out/build/lib: ../../../lib/libcycloneddsidl.so.0.10.5 ../../../lib/libidlpp.a ../../../lib/libddsc.a -ldl -ldl
